criteria.not_ready: requires no Critical findings; Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

ready_with_warnings.note: Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

issues.title: Owner scope is missing
issues.description: The spec does not define how requests are scoped to the authenticated owner.
issues.impact: Implementation would require guessing authorization behavior.
issues.fix: Add owner-scoped requirements, acceptance criteria, and error cases.

issues.title: Error payload examples are absent
issues.description: The spec names errors but does not show response payload examples.
issues.impact: The implementation can proceed only after the Critical blocker is fixed.
issues.fix: Document error payload examples when strengthening the spec.

prompt_mode: Readiness policy for low review level.
